hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -Eq 'git[[:space:]]+(add|commit|push)|gh[[:space:]]+pr[[:space:]]+create' && jq -nc --arg m 'REMINDER (CLAUDE.md §1A): this command puts changes into git. If you have NOT yet finalized this batch, finalize first — docstrings + the docs/*.md page, the CHANGELOG Unreleased entry, tests written from the ledger specs, and a green `pixi run check` — then re-run. If finalize is already complete, proceed.' '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PreToolUse",additionalContext:$m}}' || true
